TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Luis_Guillermo_Solís, title = Luis_Guillermo_Solís, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Luis_Guillermo_Solís} }

S.FORM: == Luis Guillermo Solís == ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 4, Luis Guillermo Solís, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1958) mrhuw Costa riga ta' misuw hya' ga Luis Guillermo Solís, aring ryax tay 8 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. mintzyuwaw nya Luis Guillermo Solís sa kawas 1977, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. qnxan nya María Mercedes Peñas Domingo ga, kneril ni Luis Guillermo Solís. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

== Luis Guillermo Solís == ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 4, Luis Guillermo Solís, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1958) mrhuw Costa riga ta' misuw hya' ga Luis Guillermo Solís, aring ryax tay 8 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. mintzyuwaw nya Luis Guillermo Solís sa kawas 1977, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. qnxan nya María Mercedes Peñas Domingo ga, kneril ni Luis Guillermo Solís. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == luis~ɕ ɣuillermo s~ɕol*s~ɕ == rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, luis~ɕ ɣuillermo s~ɕol*s~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw ʦ~ʨos~ɕta riɣa taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa luis~ɕ ɣuillermo s~ɕol*s~ɕ, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. mintzjuwaw nja luis~ɕ ɣuillermo s~ɕol*s~ɕ s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~ɕezi. qnxan nja mar*a merʦ~ʨe*es~ɕ pe*as~ɕ *omiŋo ɣa, kneril ni luis~ɕ ɣuillermo s~ɕol*s~ɕ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
